name: API Console
description: Interactive API documentation, key management, and webhook configuration console for developer-facing SaaS platforms.

page_briefs.api-docs: Interactive API explorer organized by resource groups in a left sidebar. Each endpoint shows method badge, path, description, and expandable request/response examples. Try-it panel on the right lets developers make live API calls with their credentials.
page_briefs.api-keys: API key management table with columns for key name, prefix, created date, last used, and status. Each row uses the api-key-row pattern with masked key display, copy button, and revoke action. Create-key button in the header opens a modal for naming and scoping new keys.
page_briefs.webhooks: Webhook endpoint list in a data table with URL, events subscribed, status, and last delivery columns. Below the table, a webhook debugger panel shows recent delivery attempts with request/response payloads, status codes, and retry controls.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
